# Data Model: E-Commerce Store MVP

**Branch**: `001-e-commerce-store` | **Date**: 2026-04-03
**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan` (Phase 1)
**Source**: `specs/02-database-schema.md` (post-bug-fix, post-clarification)

---

## Entity Relationship Overview

```
Product â”€â”€< ProductImage
Product â”€â”€< ProductVariant â”€â”€< VariantOption
Product â”€â”€< OrderItem
Product â”€â”€< Review

Customer â”€â”€< Address
Customer â”€â”€< Order
Customer â”€â”€< Review
Customer â”€â”€1 LoyaltyAccount â”€â”€< LoyaltyTransaction

Order >â”€â”€ Customer

Order >â”€â”€ Coupon (optional)

AbandonedCart  (standalone, phone @unique)
Admin â”€â”€< Notification

Notification >â”€â”€ Admin    (optional)
```

## Entities

### Product

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `id` | `Int` `@id @default(autoincrement())` | |
| `name` | `String` | |
| `description` | `String` | PostgreSQL TEXT, no `@db.Text` modifier needed |
| `price` | `Float` | Current selling price |
| `oldPrice` | `Float?` | For strikethrough discount display |
| `stock` | `Int` `@default(0)` | Product-level stock (when no variants) |
| `isActive` | `Boolean` `@default(true)` | Soft-delete / hide from storefront |
| `category` | `String` | Ù…Ù„Ø§Ø¨Ø³ / Ø¥ÙƒØ³Ø³ÙˆØ§Ø±Ø§Øª / Ù‡Ø¯Ø§ÙŠØ§ |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` `@default(now())` | |
| `updatedAt` | `DateTime` `@updatedAt` | |

**Relations**: `images`, `variants`, `orderItems`, `reviews`

**Business rules**:
- Urgency badge: when `stock < 5` (or sum of all `VariantOption.stock < 5`),
  render "Ø¨Ø§Ù‚ÙŠ X Ù‚Ø·Ø¹ Ø¨Ø³!" in `--danger` color (FR-003)
- `ReviewStars.tsx` renders `_avg(rating)` + `_count(reviews)` from a Prisma
  aggregate query

---

### ProductVariant + VariantOption

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `ProductVariant.name` | `String` | "Ø§Ù„Ù…Ù‚Ø§Ø³" or "Ø§Ù„Ù„ÙˆÙ†" |
| `VariantOption.value` | `String` | "S" / "M" / "Ø£Ø­Ù…Ø±" |
| `VariantOption.stock` | `Int` `@default(0)` | Per-option stock (replaces comma-separated string) |
| `ProductVariant.position` | `Int` `@default(0)` | Display ordering (0-based, lower = first) |
| `VariantOption.position` | `Int` `@default(0)` | Display ordering (0-based, lower = first) |

**Validation rule**: A customer cannot add a `VariantOption` with `stock = 0`
to cart. `POST /api/orders` must re-validate stock server-side before persisting.

---

### Customer

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `id` | `Int` `@id` | |
| `name` | `String` | |
| `phone` | `String` `@unique` | Primary identifier â€” Step 1 of checkout |
| `createdAt`, `updatedAt` | `DateTime` | |

**Relations**: `addresses`, `orders`, `reviews`, `loyaltyAccount?`,
`notifications`

**Creation rule (FR-007)**: `POST /api/customers` uses
`prisma.customer.upsert({ where: { phone } })`. On create, also runs
`prisma.loyaltyAccount.create({ data: { customerId } })` in the same
transaction. Returns `{ id, name, phone, currentPoints, pointsToEarn }`
(matching the api.md contract for both 200 and 201 responses).

---

### LoyaltyAccount + LoyaltyTransaction

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `LoyaltyAccount.points` | `Int` `@default(0)` | Running balance |
| `LoyaltyAccount.customerId` | `Int` `@unique` | One-to-one with Customer |
| `LoyaltyTransaction.points` | `Int` | Positive = earn, Negative = redeem |
| `LoyaltyTransaction.reason` | `String` | "Ø·Ù„Ø¨ #123" / "Ù…Ø±Ø§Ø¬Ø¹Ø© Ù…Ù†ØªØ¬" / "Ø§Ø³ØªØ±Ø¯Ø§Ø¯ Ø®ØµÙ…" |
| `LoyaltyTransaction.orderId` | `Int?` | ✅ Cross-ref fix: FK to `Order` for FR-015 auditability (earn-on-delivered traceable) |

**Earn rules**:
- Order `DELIVERED` â†’ `+Math.floor(order.total / 10)` (FR-015)
- First review for a product â†’ `+20` (FR-016)

**Redeem rule**: Customer with `points â‰¥ 100` may apply points discount at
Checkout Step 2. Deduction = `Math.floor(points / 10)` EGP. Records a negative
`LoyaltyTransaction`. If order is later cancelled, the transaction is reversed:
a **compensating positive `LoyaltyTransaction` is created** (the original negative entry is NOT deleted) to restore the customer's balance. This preserves a complete audit trail in the DB.

---

### Order

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `orderNumber` | `String` `@unique` | Format: `ORD-2026-XXXX` |
| `status` | `OrderStatus` enum | NEW â†’ PREPARING â†’ ON_WAY â†’ DELIVERED / CANCELLED |
| `paymentMethod` | `PaymentMethod` enum | CASH / VODAFONE_CASH / INSTAPAY / CARD |
| `subtotal` | `Float` | Before deductions |
| `deliveryFee` | `Float` | From `DeliveryZone.deliveryFee` (server-calculated) |
| `discount` | `Float` `@default(0)` | Coupon + loyalty redemption combined |
| `total` | `Float` | `subtotal + deliveryFee - discount` |
| `source` | `OrderSource?` enum | INSTAGRAM / WHATSAPP / GOOGLE / DIRECT / FACEBOOK / TIKTOK |

**State transitions that trigger Notifications**:

| From | To | Notification |
|------|----|-------------|
| *(new order created)* | `NEW` | `ORDER_CONFIRMED` â†’ Customer |
| any | `PREPARING` or `ON_WAY` or `DELIVERED` | `ORDER_STATUS` â†’ Customer |
| *(new order created)* | `NEW` | `NEW_ORDER` â†’ Admin |
| `ON_WAY` | `DELIVERED` | `ORDER_DELIVERED` â†’ Customer + `LoyaltyTransaction` |

---

### AbandonedCart

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `phone` | `String` `@unique` | Upsert key â€” must be unique (FR-010 bug fix) |
| `items` | `Json` | Snapshot of cart at time of abandonment |
| `reminded` | `Boolean` `@default(false)` | Set `true` after Cron fires notification |

**Cron logic**: Every hour, query
`WHERE reminded = false AND updatedAt < (now - 1h)`. Create
`ABANDONED_CART` Notification for each match. Set `reminded = true`.

---

### Notification

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `type` | `NotificationType` enum | 8 values (see below) |
| `title` | `String` | Display title generated by `buildNotificationCopy()` in `lib/notifications.ts` |
| `message` | `String` | Display body generated by `buildNotificationCopy()` |
| `payload` | `Json?` `@default("{}")` | Structured data for future extensibility (orderId, points, etc.). Nullable (`Json?`) means explicit `null` can be passed to skip payload; `@default("{}")` means new rows default to an empty JSON object if no payload is provided. In practice, `buildNotificationCopy()` always passes a payload, so the default is a safety net for manual DB inserts only. |
| `isRead` | `Boolean` `@default(false)` | |
| `customerId` | `Int?` | Target customer (nullable) |
| `adminId` | `Int?` | Target admin (nullable) |

**Constraint**: At least one of `customerId` / `adminId` MUST be non-null
(enforced at application level in `lib/notifications.ts`).

**NotificationType values**:
`ORDER_CONFIRMED` | `ORDER_STATUS` | `ORDER_DELIVERED` | `REVIEW_REQUEST` |
`LOYALTY_POINTS` | `ABANDONED_CART` | `NEW_ORDER` | `LOW_STOCK`

**`buildNotificationCopy()` payload shapes** (used in `lib/notifications.ts`):

| Type | Payload fields |
|------|----------------|
| `ORDER_CONFIRMED` | `{ orderNumber: string, total: number, pointsToEarn: number }` |
| `ORDER_STATUS` | `{ orderNumber: string, status: string }` |
| `ORDER_DELIVERED` | `{ orderNumber: string, points: number }` |
| `REVIEW_REQUEST` | `{ productName: string, productId: number }` |
| `LOYALTY_POINTS` | `{ points: number, balance: number }` |
| `ABANDONED_CART` | `{ phone: string }` |
| `NEW_ORDER` | `{ orderNumber: string, total: number }` |
| `LOW_STOCK` | `{ productName: string, stock: number }` |

---

### DeliveryZone

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `name` | `String` | "Ø§Ù„Ù‚Ø§Ù‡Ø±Ø©" / "Ø§Ù„Ø¬ÙŠØ²Ø©" / "Ø§Ù„Ø¥Ø³ÙƒÙ†Ø¯Ø±ÙŠØ©" |
| `deliveryFee` | `Float` | Flat fee in EGP used by `POST /api/orders/preview` |
| `isActive` | `Boolean` | Inactive zones are hidden from checkout UI |
| `createdAt` | `DateTime` `@default(now())` | |
| `updatedAt` | `DateTime` `@updatedAt` | |

---

### Admin

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `phone` | `String` `@unique` | Login identifier |
| `passwordHash` | `String` | `bcryptjs` hash |
| `storeName` | `String` `@default("المتجر")` | Shop name — displayed in header, metadata, receipts |
| `logo` | `String?` | Cloudinary URL for store logo — used in header, favicon, og:image |
| `whatsappNumber` | `String?` | International format without `+` (e.g. `2010XXXXXXXX`). If `null`, WhatsApp button hidden on storefront |
| `instagram` | `String?` | Instagram URL or handle |
| `facebook` | `String?` | Facebook page URL |
| `tiktok` | `String?` | TikTok URL |
| `returnPolicy` | `String?` | Return & exchange policy (Markdown/text). Rendered on `/policies/returns` page |

All store settings are managed from **Dashboard Settings** (`/dashboard/settings` → `PATCH /api/settings`).
The storefront reads them via **`GET /api/settings`** (public, no auth).

**Bootstrap**: On first login if no Admin record exists, the API reads
`ADMIN_PHONE` + `ADMIN_PASSWORD` from env vars, hashes the password, and
calls `prisma.admin.upsert`. All settings fields default to `null` (except
`storeName` which defaults to `"المتجر"`) — admin configures them from
Dashboard Settings after first login.

---

## Validation Rules Summary

| Entity | Rule | Where enforced |
|--------|------|----------------|
| `VariantOption.stock` | `>= 0` | Prisma schema + API handler |
| `Customer.phone` | `@unique` | Prisma; API returns 422 on conflict format |
| `AbandonedCart.phone` | `@unique` | Prisma `upsert` |
| `Order.total` | `= subtotal + deliveryFee - discount` | `order.service.ts` before persist |
| `Notification` target | `customerId` OR `adminId` non-null | `lib/notifications.ts` |
| `Review` uniqueness | One review per (customerId, productId) | ✅ `@@unique([customerId, productId])` in schema + `review.service.ts` |
| `LoyaltyTransaction` redeem | Points <= current balance | `loyalty.service.ts` before `prisma.loyaltyTransaction.create` |
| `OrderItem.variantOptionId` | FK for live stock re-validation | ✅ `variantOptionId Int?` in schema; `order.service.ts` checks live stock |
---

## TypeScript Interface Examples

All entities have a corresponding interface in `lib/interfaces/`. Prisma model
types are never used outside `lib/services/`. Below are the canonical interface
definitions.

### `lib/interfaces/product.ts`

```ts
export interface IProductImage {
  url:      string;
  isMain:   boolean;
  position: number;
}

export interface IProduct {
  id:          number;
  name:        string;
  description: string;
  price:       number;
  oldPrice?:   number;
  stock:       number;
  isActive:    boolean;
  category:    string;
  images:      IProductImage[]; // ✅ array of objects, not string[]
  variants:    IProductVariant[];
  avgRating:   number;
  reviewCount: number;
}

export interface IProductVariant {
  id:      number;
  name:    string;
  options: IVariantOption[];
}

export interface IVariantOption {
  id:    number;
  value: string;
  stock: number;
}
```

### `lib/interfaces/order.ts`

```ts
export type OrderStatus =
  | 'NEW' | 'PREPARING' | 'ON_WAY' | 'DELIVERED' | 'CANCELLED';

export interface IOrder {
  id:          number;
  orderNumber: string;
  status:      OrderStatus;
  customerId:  number;
  subtotal:    number;
  deliveryFee: number;
  discount:    number;
  total:       number;
  createdAt:   Date;
  items:       IOrderItem[];
}

export interface IOrderItem {
  productId:        number;
  productName:      string;
  variantOptionId?: number;
  quantity:         number;
  unitPrice:        number;
}

export interface IOrderPreview {
  subtotal:      number;
  deliveryFee:   number;
  discount:      number;
  total:         number;
  pointsToEarn:  number;
  currentPoints: number;
}
```

### `lib/interfaces/customer.ts`

```ts
export interface ICustomer {
  id:        number;
  name:      string;
  phone:     string;
  createdAt: Date;
}

export interface ILoyaltyAccount {
  id:         number;
  customerId: number;
  points:     number;
}
```

### `lib/interfaces/notification.ts`

```ts
export type NotificationType =
  | 'ORDER_CONFIRMED'
  | 'ORDER_STATUS'
  | 'ORDER_DELIVERED'
  | 'REVIEW_REQUEST'
  | 'LOYALTY_POINTS'
  | 'ABANDONED_CART'
  | 'NEW_ORDER'
  | 'LOW_STOCK';
// ⚠️ POINTS_EARNED is NOT a valid enum value — use LOYALTY_POINTS for points-balance messages

export interface INotification {
  id:          number;
  title:       string;
  message:     string;
  type:        NotificationType;
  payload:     Record<string, unknown> | null;
  customerId?: number;
  adminId?:    number;
  isRead:      boolean;
  createdAt:   Date;
}
```

### `lib/interfaces/index.ts` - Re-export barrel

```ts
export * from './product';
export * from './order';
export * from './customer';
export * from './notification';
export * from './admin';
```

> **Rule**: All `lib/interfaces` imports MUST use the barrel:
> `import type { IOrder } from '@/lib/interfaces'`
